statement: In the Many Labs 1 replication project (Klein et al., 2014), anchoring was one of the very large effects observed across the 36 samples.
scope_note: Multi-site direct replication finding: 13 effects across 36 samples, N = 6,344. Table 2 reports the four anchoring tasks at median d approximately 1.17-2.42, all p < .001, replicating consistently. The claim records that anchoring replicated as a large effect in this project; it does not establish the underlying cognitive mechanism, nor generalise beyond the Jacowitz-Kahneman anchoring paradigm that was tested.
